page.title: Advanced Product File Uploader
page.subtitle: Let customers upload files when purchasing products
onboarding.welcomeDesc: Let your customers upload files when purchasing products — perfect for custom orders, personalization, and document submissions.
onboarding.simpleSteps: Four simple steps to get started
onboarding.feature.fileManagementDesc: Download all uploads from one place
onboarding.allSetDesc: Start by configuring your first product for file uploads, or explore the dashboard.
upsell.title: Unlock More Products
upsell.desc: Upgrade to configure unlimited products and access premium features.
celebration.message: Congratulations! You've configured your first product for file uploads!
stats.plan.tooltip: Product slots used on your current plan
stats.products.tooltip: Total products available in your Wix store
stats.products.title: Products
stats.products.subtitle: In your store
stats.config.tooltip: How many products have file uploads enabled
stats.config.title: Configuration
stats.files.tooltip: Total files uploaded by your customers
stats.files.title: Files Uploaded
stats.files.subtitle: By customers
products.title: Products
products.applyAll.tooltip: Enable file uploads with default settings (1 file, images & PDFs, 10MB) for all products
products.limitWarning.title: Free plan limit reached
products.limitWarning.desc: You've used all {count} product slots. Upgrade to configure more products.
products.status.tooltip: Shows whether file uploads are enabled for this product
products.status.enabledTooltip: File uploads are active — customers can upload files
products.status.notConfiguredTooltip: Click Configure to enable file uploads
plan.manageSubscription: Manage your subscription and product limits
plan.slotsUsed.tooltip: Number of products configured for file uploads out of your plan's limit
plan.freeUpgrade: Free plan — upgrade for more product slots
pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your store
pricing.tooltip: Plans are billed monthly. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time.
plugins.title: Site Plugins
plugins.subtitle: Optional — show a badge on the checkout page for products with uploaded files
plugins.tooltip: Plugins add visual indicators to your site so customers can see which products have uploaded files
plugins.checkout.title: Checkout Page Badge
plugins.checkout.tooltip: Adds a 'Custom design item' label next to products with uploaded files on the checkout page
plugins.checkout.desc: Display "Custom design item" badge next to products with uploaded files
plugins.checkout.hint: The cart page badge is always active. The checkout plugin is optional and can also be added manually via the Wix Editor.
setup.title: Setup Guide
setup.subtitle: Follow these steps to get started with Product File Uploader
setup.step1.title: Install the App
setup.step1.desc: Add Product File Uploader to your Wix site from the App Market.
setup.step2.title: Configure Products
setup.step2.desc: Go to the Manage tab and select which products should accept file uploads.
setup.step3.title: Bulk or Individual Setup
setup.step3.desc: Use 'Apply to All Products' for quick setup, or configure products individually.
setup.step4.title: Customers Upload Files
setup.step4.desc: When buyers purchase configured products, they'll be able to upload files during checkout.
setup.step5.title: View in Orders
setup.step5.desc: Uploaded files appear directly in the Wix Orders page for easy access and download.
howTo.title: How to Use
howTo.step1: Select products that need file uploads from the Manage tab
howTo.step2: Click "Configure" to set file type limits and instructions
howTo.step3: Use bulk actions to enable multiple products at once
howTo.step4: Customer uploads will appear in the Wix Orders page
howTo.step5: Download files directly from order details
tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: Use "Apply to All Products" for quick setup of your entire catalog
tips.tip2: Set appropriate file size limits to prevent large uploads
tips.tip3: Add clear instructions to guide customers on what to upload
tips.tip4: Enable "Required Upload" for products that need customization files
tips.tip5: Filter products by collection for organized bulk configuration
help.title: Need Help?
help.desc: Have questions or need assistance? Our support team is here to help.
moreApps.title: More apps by us
moreApps.frequentlyBoughtDesc: Show Frequently Bought Together in the Side Card
moreApps.productViewerDesc: Interactive 360° product views that boost sales
moreApps.shippingVerifierDesc: Protect your store from invalid orders
moreApps.googleDriveDesc: Embed & Share Google Drive files on your site
panel.appearance.tooltip: Customize how the upload widget looks on your product pages
panel.accentColor.tooltip: Sets the color of buttons and active elements in the upload widget
panel.buttonText.tooltip: The label shown on the file upload button
panel.behavior.tooltip: Control the behavior of the upload widget
panel.showInstructions.tooltip: When enabled, displays the upload instructions text configured in the dashboard below the upload area
panel.howItWorksDesc: This widget auto-detects the product on the page and loads the upload configuration from the dashboard. File types, limits, and instructions are set per product in the app dashboard.
panel.checkout.title: Checkout File Badge
panel.checkout.badgeSettings.tooltip: Configure the badge that appears next to products with uploaded files on the checkout page
panel.checkout.badgeLabel.tooltip: Text shown next to products that have uploaded files
panel.checkout.howItWorksDesc: This badge appears on the checkout page next to line items that have customer-uploaded files. It helps both the customer and store owner identify custom orders.
toast.checkoutDisconnected: Plugin marked as disconnected. You can remove it manually in the Wix Editor.
toast.freeLimitReached: Free plan limit reached ({count} products). Upgrade to configure more.
toast.freeSlotSkipped: Only {slots} product(s) can be added on the free plan. {blocked} skipped.
products.disableAll.tooltip: Disable file uploads for all currently enabled products
